data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for automatic photo quality checks.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the automatic photo quality check, but the evidence provided does not include any specific tests or endpoints that confirm this functionality. The prior step evidence does not address the requirement for photo capture or quality checks, leading to an inconclusive status. Without concrete evidence of the implementation or testing of this requirement, it cannot be validated.
gaps: No evidence of photo quality check functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the automatic photo quality check requirement.
